public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as ward mediator.
appearance: Bright-plumed road gear, polished fittings, and visible attention to presentation mark the role before the voice does.
manner: Moves like someone trained to decide quickly once the threshold for action has been crossed. In Cosmouth, that reads as someone maritime, urbane, and commercially fluid, balancing archive-minded memory with port pragmatism, and the habits of a ward mediator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ward mediator in and around Cosmoria, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cosmoria workable through the obligations of ward mediator while managing the immediate pressure of storm weather in Cosmouth.
hidden_pressure: Must prepare for violence without letting the surrounding institution look openly unstable. Around Cosmoria, that usually means carrying storm weather, trade vulnerability, archive and tax discipline without letting the role of ward mediator visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Nerissa Bluefin needs help hardening a position, drilling unreliable auxiliaries, or reading an approaching threat around Cosmoria.
Nerissa Bluefin can pull the party into a dispute over readiness, chain of command, or blamed failure near Cosmoria.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V30_3 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Weapon discipline, drilled stillness, and practiced readiness mark Nerissa Bluefin as someone tied to organized force rather than casual violence. In Cosmoria, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Cosmouth.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cosmoria: drill yards, fortifications, command posts, or exposed routes

first_impression: Nerissa Bluefin presents as Moves like someone trained to decide quickly once the threshold for action has been crossed. In Cosmouth, that reads as someone maritime, urbane, and commercially fluid, balancing archive-minded memory with port pragmatism, and the habits of a ward mediator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Ward Mediator, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Cosmouth.
what_they_refuse: Nerissa Bluefin refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Ward Mediator too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Nerissa Bluefin can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Nerissa Bluefin adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Nerissa Bluefin is Known locally through day-to-day work as ward mediator. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Ward Mediator.
